34 Secrets of Birth Time Rectification
The logic and philosophy behind such efforts to calculate
ascendant longitudes for even special moments of time and
to consider them as Kshenika graha (momentary influence)
is quite interesting.
Here the end point of a complete Muhurta within the Yama
is taken as rising time of Mandi. Not only the end point of
complete Muhurta within Saturn's Yama, but also the method
to calculate end points of complete Muhurta within other
Yamas are also given in other texts. But here I am limiting
the description to Mandi alone.
As told earlier, the end point ofa complete Muhurta within
the yama of Saturn is termed Mandi. Day is composed of 15
Nakshatra Muhurtas and night the same. Thus 30 Nakshatra
Muhurtas complete an 'Ahoratra' (24 hours). Thus -
Sunday 26th Khati = End of 13th Muhurta
Monday 22nd Khati = End of 11th Muhurta
Tuesday 18th Khati = End of 9th Muhurta
Wednesday 14th Khati =End of7th Muhurta
